webcam.title: Webcam
webcam.prompt: Listen to a conversation between Theo Brook and Luna Reed about webcams. What are they used for? Do all computers or laptops need a webcam?

questions.text: What are webcams used for?
questions.correct: To video chat and record videos

questions.text: Do all computers or laptops need a webcam?
questions.correct: No, laptops already have a built-in camera
incorrect: Yes, to connect to the internet

dialogue.speaker: theo_brook
dialogue.text: Hey Luna Reed! What is that in your hand?

dialogue.speaker: luna_reed
dialogue.text: Oh hey Theo Brook! It's my new webcam!

dialogue.speaker: theo_brook
dialogue.text: Why do you need a webcam?

dialogue.speaker: luna_reed
dialogue.text: I recently purchased a desktop computer! I can connect it via USB to my computer and video chat with my friends. I can also record myself cooking in my pot to show everyone my recipes!

dialogue.speaker: theo_brook
dialogue.text: That's really cool! I have a laptop with a built-in camera, so I don't need a webcam. Let's video chat sometime!

dialogue.speaker: luna_reed
dialogue.text: Let's do it! I'm gonna take my webcam home. I'll call you Theo Brook!

headphones.title: Headphones
headphones.prompt: Try to talk with Jasper Fern. Why weren't they able to hear you initially? What are headphones used for?

questions.text: Why weren't they able to hear you initially?
questions.correct: They were listening to music through their headphones
incorrect: They were talking to someone else

questions.text: What are headphones used for?
questions.correct: To listen to music, podcasts and take calls
incorrect: To record sounds and amplify voices
To watch videos on a screen

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Oh hello Jasper Fern!

dialogue.speaker: jasper_fern
dialogue.action: Doesn't answer — Jasper Fern is listening to music through headphones, facing the opposite way

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Hello? Can you hear me?
dialogue.action: Player taps Jasper Fern on the shoulder

dialogue.speaker: jasper_fern
dialogue.text: Oh hi! You scared me!

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, I said hello but you didn't hear me.

dialogue.speaker: jasper_fern
dialogue.text: Don't worry, it's because of my brand new headphones!

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Oh cool! I'm sorry I don't know what headphones are or what they do.

dialogue.speaker: jasper_fern
dialogue.text: I can explain it to you! Headphones are used to listen to music, podcasts and take calls!

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Really!? Headphones can do all of that? Can I call my mom from them?

dialogue.speaker: jasper_fern
dialogue.text: *Chuckles* Well not exactly, you need another gadget like a computer, MP3 player or a phone to connect your headphones and choose what you want to listen to through them.

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: I understand now. Can I borrow your headphones to listen to some music?

dialogue.speaker: jasper_fern
dialogue.text: Sure!

smart_watch.title: Smart Watch
smart_watch.prompt: Talk to Roy Ashwood, ask for the time. What gadget did Roy Ashwood use to tell the time? Why does Roy Ashwood prefer a smart watch over a classical watch?

questions.text: What gadget did Roy Ashwood use to tell the time?
Why does Roy Ashwood prefer a smart watch over a classical watch?
questions.correct: It also shows text messages and counts daily steps

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Excuse me, do you know what time it is?

dialogue.speaker: roy_ashwood
dialogue.text: It is 2 o'clock in the afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: How do you always know the time?

dialogue.speaker: roy_ashwood
dialogue.text: I check my smart watch on my wrist!

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Can it only tell time?

dialogue.speaker: roy_ashwood
dialogue.text: No, it also shows text messages I receive on my phone and the number of my steps during the day!

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: Very interesting, thank you for telling me the time!

printer.title: Printer
printer.prompt: Listen to a conversation between Eli Carter and Ivy Grant. What technological gadget were they talking about? What are two things a printer can do?

questions.text: What technological gadget were they talking about?
What are two things a printer can do?
incorrect: Connect to the internet and record videos

dialogue.speaker: eli_carter
dialogue.text: My dog ate my homework last night.

dialogue.speaker: ivy_grant
dialogue.text: That sounds funny, but is also not good. What are you going to do now?

dialogue.speaker: eli_carter
dialogue.text: My dad says I need to print my homework again before class starts.

dialogue.speaker: ivy_grant
dialogue.text: You need to use a printer then.

dialogue.speaker: eli_carter
dialogue.text: What does a printer do exactly?

dialogue.speaker: ivy_grant
dialogue.text: It prints documents and photos from your computer or phone onto paper. You can also scan papers to make more copies of them!

dialogue.speaker: eli_carter
dialogue.text: I've heard my dad use the printer at home. It's really loud!

dialogue.speaker: ivy_grant
dialogue.text: Yes, it makes some noise, but it works very well.

digital_camera.title: Digital Camera
digital_camera.prompt: Listen to what Amara Bennet and Zoe Porter are doing. What gadget are they using? Does a digital camera have another function?

questions.text: What gadget are they using to take pictures?
What else can you do with a digital camera?

dialogue.speaker: amara_bennet
dialogue.text: Smile and don't move!

dialogue.speaker: zoe_porter
dialogue.text: My hair looks messy, I feel nervous.

dialogue.speaker: amara_bennet
dialogue.text: Don't worry you look great! Now say cheese!

dialogue.speaker: zoe_porter
dialogue.text: Cheese!

dialogue.speaker: amara_bennet
dialogue.text: The picture turned out great thanks to my digital camera!

dialogue.speaker: zoe_porter
dialogue.text: You're right I look great! What else can the digital camera do?

dialogue.speaker: amara_bennet
dialogue.text: I can also record videos with it.

dialogue.speaker: zoe_porter
dialogue.text: Oh no! The battery on my phone is almost empty.

dialogue.speaker: amara_bennet
dialogue.text: That's okay, my camera still has power.

computer_mouse.title: Computer Mouse
computer_mouse.prompt: Listen to what Hazel Pike and Talia Carter are talking about. What is the gadget Bob's nephew is missing to work their desktop computer? What is the mouse used for?

questions.text: What gadget is Bob's nephew missing to work their desktop computer?
What is the mouse used for?
questions.correct: To move the cursor and click things on the screen

dialogue.speaker: hazel_pike
dialogue.text: My sister recently bought a desktop computer! She bought a webcam but forgot to buy a mouse and keyboard!

dialogue.speaker: talia_carter
dialogue.text: Why does she need a mouse and keyboard?

dialogue.speaker: hazel_pike
dialogue.text: Without the mouse she can't use her computer! She needs it to move the cursor and click things on the screen. Without a keyboard she can't type letters or numbers into her computer.

dialogue.speaker: player
dialogue.text: *Inside head* One of these gadgets is what Bob's nephew is missing.
dialogue.action: Bob will say what the device his nephew is missing does — that's how the player determines the missing gadget

tablet.title: Tablet
tablet.prompt: Listen to what Lisa Frost and Archer Solen are talking about. What gadget are they talking about? What are two things a tablet can be used for?

questions.text: What gadget are they talking about?
What are two things a tablet can be used for?
incorrect: Making phone calls and sending faxes

dialogue.speaker: lisa_frost
dialogue.text: Hello Archer Solen! Are you reading something or watching a video right now?

dialogue.speaker: archer_solen
dialogue.text: Hi, no I'm playing video games with my tablet. I already read and watched videos with it!

dialogue.speaker: lisa_frost
dialogue.text: Is it heavy to carry in your bag?

dialogue.speaker: archer_solen
dialogue.text: No, it is very light, I take it to school everyday.

dialogue.speaker: lisa_frost
dialogue.text: I feel a little hungry.

dialogue.speaker: archer_solen
dialogue.text: Let's use my tablet to navigate the internet and find some ideas for snacks we can make!

microphone.title: Microphone
microphone.prompt: Listen to a conversation between Jax Knox and Nolan Lock. What gadget are they using to record or amplify sound? Does the microphone have another function?

questions.text: What gadget are they using to record or amplify sound?
Does the microphone have another function?
questions.correct: Yes, it can also be used for singing
incorrect: No, it can only record sounds
Yes, it can also take pictures
Yes, it can also connect to the internet

dialogue.speaker: jax_knox
dialogue.text: Testing… 1, 2, 3! Can you hear me clearly Nolan Lock?

dialogue.speaker: nolan_lock
dialogue.text: Yes, your voice sounds loud and clear.

dialogue.speaker: jax_knox
dialogue.text: It's all thanks to my new microphone!

dialogue.speaker: nolan_lock
dialogue.text: What does it do exactly?

dialogue.speaker: jax_knox
dialogue.text: It records sounds and makes voices louder for everyone to hear.

dialogue.speaker: nolan_lock
dialogue.text: I like singing in the shower at home.

dialogue.speaker: jax_knox
dialogue.text: You can also use a microphone for singing. Not in the shower though!

monitor.title: Monitor
monitor.prompt: Listen to the conversation between Corin Crest and Sylas Star. What device are they talking about? What do they see on this screen?

questions.text: What device are they talking about?
What do they see on this screen?
questions.correct: Video games, videos and school work

dialogue.speaker: corin_crest
dialogue.text: Your desk is very organized today.

dialogue.speaker: sylas_star
dialogue.text: Thanks! I just cleaned it.

dialogue.speaker: corin_crest
dialogue.text: Why is there a TV on your desk?

dialogue.speaker: sylas_star
dialogue.text: It's not a TV, it's a monitor for my computer.

dialogue.speaker: corin_crest
dialogue.text: What do you see on it?

dialogue.speaker: sylas_star
dialogue.text: I see video games, videos, school work and more!

dialogue.speaker: corin_crest
dialogue.text: I think I prefer TV's to see my shows, and bigger desks!

smart_tv.title: Smart TV
smart_tv.prompt: Listen to the conversation between Lucas Miles and Sofia Ford. What type of TV are they using? Select one thing they can watch on it.

questions.text: What type of TV are they using?
Select one thing they can watch on it.

dialogue.speaker: lucas_miles
dialogue.text: It's raining, so staying inside is nice.

dialogue.speaker: sofia_ford
dialogue.text: Yes, let's turn on the smart TV!

dialogue.speaker: lucas_miles
dialogue.text: Why is it called a smart TV?

dialogue.speaker: sofia_ford
dialogue.text: Because it is connected to the internet!

dialogue.speaker: lucas_miles
dialogue.text: Oh, so we can watch Netflix shows, movies and YouTube videos!

dialogue.speaker: sofia_ford
dialogue.text: How about we make some popcorn?

dialogue.speaker: lucas_miles
dialogue.text: That is a great idea!

calculator.title: Calculator
calculator.prompt: Listen to the conversation between Layla Kim and Hannah Blue. What device helps them with numbers? Why do they use it?

questions.text: What device helps them with numbers?
Why do they use it?
questions.correct: Because it helps with numbers and is very accurate
incorrect: Because it checks spelling and grammar
Because the teacher always requires it

dialogue.speaker: layla_kim
dialogue.text: This math homework is taking forever. I don't have enough fingers to count!

dialogue.speaker: hannah_blue
dialogue.text: The teacher let us use a calculator!

dialogue.speaker: layla_kim
dialogue.text: Cool! What is a calculator?

dialogue.speaker: hannah_blue
dialogue.text: It's a device that helps us with calculations and numbers

dialogue.speaker: layla_kim
dialogue.text: Does it ever make a mistake?

dialogue.speaker: hannah_blue
dialogue.text: No, it is very accurate.

mp3_player_earphones.title: MP3 Player & Earphones
mp3_player_earphones.prompt: Listen to the conversation between Chloe Green and Aria Price. What device do they use to select the music? What device do they use to listen to the music? Are earphones only used with an MP3 player?

questions.text: What device do they use to select the music?
What device do they use to listen to the music?
Are earphones only used with an MP3 player?
questions.correct: No, they also work with phones, tablets and computers

dialogue.speaker: chloe_green
dialogue.text: I hear music, but I don't see speakers anywhere!

dialogue.speaker: aria_price
dialogue.text: I'm using my MP3 player!

dialogue.speaker: chloe_green
dialogue.text: Could you turn it down a little?

dialogue.speaker: aria_price
dialogue.text: Sure! I will just use my earphones; I'll be able to hear it even louder without disturbing you.

dialogue.speaker: chloe_green
dialogue.text: Can earphones work with other devices?

dialogue.speaker: aria_price
dialogue.text: Yes, phones, tablets and computers too.

dialogue.speaker: chloe_green
dialogue.text: I prefer quiet places, like the library!

router.title: Router
router.prompt: Listen to the conversation between Nixi Spark and John Bolt. What device gives the internet to other devices? What happens when it is off?

questions.text: What device gives the internet to other devices?
What happens when it is off?
questions.correct: The internet stops working on all devices
incorrect: You can no longer charge your phone

dialogue.speaker: nixi_spark
dialogue.text: Oh no! The internet stopped working while I was watching a video.

dialogue.speaker: john_bolt
dialogue.text: Let me check the router in the corner.

dialogue.speaker: nixi_spark
dialogue.text: A router? What device is that?

dialogue.speaker: john_bolt
dialogue.text: It's the device that gives internet to other devices. I'm going to restart it, that always works.

dialogue.speaker: nixi_spark
dialogue.text: Oh, I hope it does! If not, we're going to be really bored. Or...we could go to the park!

dialogue.speaker: john_bolt
dialogue.text: *grunts*

laptop.title: Laptop
laptop.prompt: Listen to the conversation between Taro Ember and Fenn Lux. What computer do they use? Why is it easy to carry?

questions.text: What computer do they use?
Why is it easy to carry?
incorrect: Because it fits in a pocket
Because it has a carrying handle

dialogue.speaker: taro_ember
dialogue.text: Are you studying in the library again?

dialogue.speaker: fenn_lux
dialogue.text: Yes, I have to type up an essay.

dialogue.speaker: taro_ember
dialogue.text: How are you going to do that if your desktop computer is at home?

dialogue.speaker: fenn_lux
dialogue.text: I brought my laptop! It is easy to carry because it's so light.

dialogue.speaker: taro_ember
dialogue.text: I wish I had a laptop. I don't like reading books here; I prefer the arcade!

dialogue.speaker: fenn_lux
dialogue.text: Me too, but I need to do my homework.

smart_phone.title: Smart Phone
smart_phone.prompt: Listen to the conversation between Kiko Flux and Priya Flux. What device is in their hand? Name two things they do with it.

questions.text: What device is in their hand?
Name two things they do with it.
incorrect: Play video games and read books
Listen to music and take pictures

dialogue.speaker: kiko_flux
dialogue.text: You always have that device with you.

dialogue.speaker: priya_flux
dialogue.text: Yes, it's my smartphone.

dialogue.speaker: kiko_flux
dialogue.text: What do you use it for most?

dialogue.speaker: priya_flux
dialogue.text: I mainly use it to message my friends and watch videos.

dialogue.speaker: kiko_flux
dialogue.text: Can you also search the internet?

dialogue.speaker: priya_flux
dialogue.text: Yes, I use it for many things.

cell_phone.title: Cell Phone
cell_phone.prompt: Listen to the conversation between Daniel Moon and Fernanda Vale. What device do they use to call people? Is it new or old?

questions.text: What device do they use to call people?
Is it new or old?
incorrect: It is a smart device with many features

dialogue.speaker: daniel_moon
dialogue.text: How do you contact people when you travel?

dialogue.speaker: fernanda_valle
dialogue.text: I use my old cell phone.

dialogue.speaker: daniel_moon
dialogue.text: Is it a smartphone?

dialogue.speaker: fernanda_valle
dialogue.text: No, it's a simpler and older version of a smartphone.

dialogue.speaker: daniel_moon
dialogue.text: What can it do?

dialogue.speaker: fernanda_valle
dialogue.text: It can only call and send messages.

dialogue.speaker: daniel_moon
dialogue.text: Simple things still work well.

webcam.speaker: bob
webcam.text: Psst! Hey, you! Yes, you. Come here, I've got a mission for you.

webcam.speaker: player
choices: Is this going to be dangerous?
Do I get paid for this?

webcam.speaker: bob
webcam.text: See those two over there? Theo Brook and Luna Reed? Luna's showing off some new gadget.

webcam.speaker: player
choices: Should I just go ask her?

webcam.speaker: bob
webcam.text: That's exactly what I need you to find out! Go listen in on their conversation and report back to me.

webcam.speaker: player
choices: What do I get if I figure it out?

webcam.speaker: bob
webcam.text: The satisfaction of a job well done! Now go, go, go!

headphones.speaker: bob
headphones.text: Alright, superstar. See that person over there? Jasper Fern.

headphones.speaker: player
choices: They look like they're in their own world.
They look like they're wearing something on their ears.

headphones.speaker: bob
headphones.text: Exactly! They've got something on their ears and haven't heard a single word I've said to them all morning.

headphones.speaker: player
choices: Maybe they just don't like you, Bob.

headphones.speaker: bob
headphones.text: Ha! Probably! But I need you to go find out what that gadget is and what it does. Good luck getting their attention!

smart_watch.speaker: bob
smart_watch.text: Quick question — do you know what time it is?

smart_watch.speaker: player
choices: Time for you to get a watch?
Why, are you late for something?

smart_watch.speaker: bob
smart_watch.text: Well Roy Ashwood always knows! And I've never seen them pull out a phone. Go ask them and pay attention to how they check the time.

smart_watch.speaker: player
choices: Maybe they just have really good instincts.

smart_watch.speaker: bob
smart_watch.text: It's not instincts — it's on their wrist! Now go find out what it is. You've got this.

printer.speaker: bob
printer.text: Okay, so. Eli Carter's dog ate their homework last night.

printer.speaker: bob
printer.text: Very real! Eli is talking to Ivy Grant about how to fix the situation. There's a gadget that can save the day.

printer.speaker: player
choices: A gadget that reverses dog digestion?
I think I know where this is going.

printer.speaker: bob
printer.text: Go eavesdrop — I mean, go listen in on their conversation and find out what gadget comes to the rescue!

digital_camera.speaker: bob
digital_camera.text: I just spotted Amara Bennet pointing something at Zoe Porter and yelling 'say cheese!'

digital_camera.speaker: bob
digital_camera.text: Pictures, yes! But with what exactly? Go check it out — and see if that gadget can do anything besides snap photos!

digital_camera.speaker: bob
digital_camera.text: The thrill of knowledge! That's what's in it for you. Now scoot!

computer_mouse.speaker: bob
computer_mouse.text: Okay, this one is personal. My nephew just got a brand new desktop computer.

computer_mouse.speaker: bob
computer_mouse.text: Something IS missing! He can't even use it. Go listen to Hazel Pike and Talia Carter — they're talking about the exact same problem.

computer_mouse.speaker: player
choices: Is your nephew Hazel or Talia?
I'll go find out what's missing!

computer_mouse.speaker: bob
computer_mouse.text: Not a coincidence — I planned this whole mission! Now go find out what gadget my nephew is desperately missing!

tablet.speaker: bob
tablet.text: You know what I find fascinating? Some gadgets can do like five different things.

tablet.speaker: player
choices: I can also do five things!

tablet.speaker: bob
tablet.text: Ha! Go talk to Lisa Frost and Archer Solen. Archer has one of those multi-tasking gadgets and uses it for everything.

tablet.speaker: player
choices: What are they using it for right now?

tablet.speaker: bob
tablet.text: Find out for yourself — that's the whole point of the mission! Go, go, go!

microphone.speaker: bob
microphone.text: Did you hear that? Someone's testing something over there.

microphone.speaker: bob
microphone.text: That's Jax Knox! He's got some gadget that makes his voice super loud. Go find out what it is!

microphone.speaker: player
choices: I could use one of those.

microphone.speaker: bob
microphone.text: Maybe! Only one way to find out. Go talk to Jax and Nolan Lock and get the full story!

monitor.speaker: bob
monitor.text: I walked past Sylas Star's desk today and thought they had a TV sitting on it.

monitor.speaker: player
choices: A TV on a desk? Fancy.

monitor.speaker: bob
monitor.text: Corin Crest thought the exact same thing! Go listen to them figure it out together. Turns out it's a different gadget entirely.

monitor.speaker: player
choices: Ooh, I wonder what it is.

monitor.speaker: bob
monitor.text: Bigger than small, smaller than a TV! Now go — your curiosity awaits.

smart_tv.speaker: bob
smart_tv.text: It's raining outside today. Perfect day to stay in and watch something, right?

smart_tv.speaker: player
choices: I'd rather go splash in puddles.
What does this have to do with a mission?

smart_tv.speaker: bob
smart_tv.text: Lucas Miles and Sofia Ford had the same idea! They're turning on some kind of TV. But it's not just any TV...

smart_tv.speaker: bob
smart_tv.text: Go find out exactly what makes it so special! I'd check myself but... I'm very busy. Extremely busy.

calculator.speaker: bob
calculator.text: Layla Kim had the same problem with her math homework! Go listen to her and Hannah Blue figure it out.

calculator.speaker: bob
calculator.text: Find out what gadget saves the day — and whether it ever makes mistakes. Numbers don't lie!

mp3_player_earphones.speaker: bob
mp3_player_earphones.text: I keep hearing music but I can't find the speakers anywhere. Am I going crazy?

mp3_player_earphones.speaker: player
choices: Maybe it's all in your head, Bob.

mp3_player_earphones.speaker: bob
mp3_player_earphones.text: It's coming from Aria Price! She's got some gadget playing music and things in her ears too. Go investigate!

mp3_player_earphones.speaker: bob
mp3_player_earphones.text: Two gadgets for the price of one today! The one playing the music AND the things in her ears. Go find out what both do!

router.speaker: bob
router.text: Have you ever had the internet just... stop? Right in the middle of something important?

router.speaker: player
choices: Once during a really good video. Devastating.

router.speaker: bob
router.text: Nixi Spark is going through that right now! And John Bolt seems to know exactly which gadget is responsible.

router.speaker: player
choices: I'll go find out what it is!

router.speaker: bob
router.text: Go listen in! This gadget affects every device in the building. Very important stuff — don't let Nixi down!

laptop.speaker: bob
laptop.text: Can you type an essay without a desk?

laptop.speaker: bob
laptop.text: Fenn Lux can! They brought a gadget to the library that lets them do computer stuff from anywhere. Go find out what it is!

laptop.speaker: bob
laptop.text: Go confirm your hunch with Taro Ember and Fenn Lux. And no peeking at what Fenn is typing!

smart_phone.speaker: bob
smart_phone.text: You ever notice how some people are always looking down at something in their hand?

smart_phone.speaker: player
choices: I thought they were checking for ants.
Yeah, what are they always looking at?

smart_phone.speaker: bob
smart_phone.text: That's Priya Flux! Always got that device with them. Go talk to Kiko Flux and Priya — find out what it is and everything it can do.

smart_phone.speaker: player
choices: Is it more than just calling people?

smart_phone.speaker: bob
smart_phone.text: Much, much more! That's exactly what you need to find out. Off you go!

cell_phone.speaker: bob
cell_phone.text: Not every gadget has to be brand new to be useful, you know.

cell_phone.speaker: bob
cell_phone.text: Ha! Fernanda Valle travels a lot and uses a very old, simple gadget to stay in touch. Daniel Moon just asked them about it.

cell_phone.speaker: bob
cell_phone.text: Go find out! Sometimes the simplest tools do exactly what you need — nothing more, nothing less.
